scriptTitle: Install OneNote (+ tray remove + OneDrive disable)
scriptDesc: Install OneNote desktop, remove OneNote tray icon, disable OneDrive autostart and scheduled tasks

messages.fallbackDownload: Falling back to Microsoft 365 OneNote (Click-to-Run) installer: {url}
messages.fallbackInstalling: Running Microsoft 365 OneNote Click-to-Run installer with silent args...
messages.installFailed: OneNote installation failed via both Chocolatey and fallback download
messages.trayRemoved: OneNote tray icon disabled and process killed
messages.trayNotPresent: OneNote tray helper not running -- nothing to remove
messages.disablingOneDrive: Disabling OneDrive (process kill + scheduled tasks + autostart)...
messages.oneDriveNotRunning: OneDrive not running -- nothing to stop
messages.oneDriveAutostartRemoved: Removed OneDrive autostart entry from HKCU Run key
messages.oneDriveAutostartMissing: OneDrive autostart entry not present -- nothing to remove
messages.setupComplete: OneNote setup complete (install + tray + OneDrive disable)
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.install: Install OneNote + remove tray + disable OneDrive (default)
